title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, discusses his decision to leave competitive sailing and build an ad monetization platform for AI tools, raising $26M. He argues that ads rather than subscriptions are the sustainable monetization model for AI applications, and identifies human trust as the bottleneck for AI agent adoption, not technical capability.
